info.title: TraefikPreConfiguratorWindows
info.description: Allows per environment configuration of Traefik on Service Fabric.

options.name: --UseEnvironmentVariables
options.description: Instead of using specified options, use Environment varibles with the same name (except the -- at start). This is to enable different integrations for different environments. If you use this, command line values are ignored.

options.name: --ConfigureCerts
options.description: Configures certs for Traefik by dropping them into the specifiec directory (relative to executing assembly). Certs are dropped in .key and .crt format.

options.name: --CertsToConfigure
options.description: The value looks something like SSLCert;MyLocalMachine;7ce597cba5ae055fa37f222aaffc1007c3d61277,ClusterCert;KeyVault;ClusterCertSecretName. The format isNameOfTheCert1;Source1;<Cert identifier1>,NameOfCert2;Source2;<Cert identifier2>.Possible Source values are 'MyLocalMachine' which fetches certs from Personal under LocalMachine Store and 'KeyVault' which fetches the cert from KeyVault. If KeyVault is specified, Specify ClientId and secret using --KeyVaultUri, --KeyVaultClientId, --KeyVaultClientSecret or --KeyVaultClientCert

options.name: --KeyVaultUri
options.description: Uri to use for KeyVault connection. Use --KeyVaultClientId to specify ClientId of the app to use to access Key Vault.

options.name: --KeyVaultClientId
options.description: Client Id to use for KeyVault connection. Specify the secret by using --KeyVaultClientSecret or --KeyVaultClientCert.

options.name: --KeyVaultClientSecret
options.description: Client secret to use for KeyVault connection. Specify the ClientId using --KeyVaultClientId.

options.name: --KeyVaultClientCert
options.description: Cert thumbprint to be used to contact key vault. The cert needs to be present on the machine. Specify the ClientId using --KeyVaultClientId.

options.name: --ApplicationInsightsKey
options.description: Instrumentation key to push traces for PreConfiguration into Application Insights.
